text:
File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: Six-character field that concatenates three two-digit codes. 

The two leftmost digits (first and second characters) are the reason for service code: 
AD = Additional Drug Needed 
AN = Prescription Authentication 
AR = Adverse Drug Reaction 
AT = Additive Toxicity 
CD = Chronic Disease Management 
CH = Call Help Desk 
CS = Patient Complaint/Symptom 
DA = Drug — Allergy 
DC = Drug — Disease (Inferred) 
DD = Drug — Drug Interaction 
DF = Drug — Food
